description: E2E questions for unknown public repos (<1K stars) - minimal LLM prior, reproducible

questions.query: How does Muffin's plugin system work?
key_facts: BasePlugin in plugins.py is the abstract base class
Plugins have optional startup, shutdown, middleware methods
setup() method registers plugin with the Application
Plugin configuration uses modconfig.Config with defaults

questions.query: How does Muffin application initialization work?
key_facts: Application class in app.py extends asgi_tools.App
Configuration loaded from modules via modconfig.Config
Environment variables prefixed with app name are loaded
Manager handles CLI commands

questions.query: How does Muffin handle background tasks?
key_facts: BACKGROUND_TASKS is a ContextVar in app.py
Tasks are stored as a set of Awaitable objects
aio_wait from asgi_tools handles async waiting
Background tasks context is per-request

questions.query: How does Panther's URL routing work?
key_facts: flatten_urls() in routings.py converts nested dict to flat
finalize_urls() converts flat dict back to nested for matching
_is_url_endpoint_valid() validates URL patterns
Path variables use angle bracket syntax like <id>

questions.query: How does Panther's middleware system work?
key_facts: HTTPMiddleware and WebsocketMiddleware are base classes
Middleware receives dispatch callable in __init__
__call__ receives Request and returns Response
CORSMiddleware and MonitoringMiddleware are built-in

questions.query: How does SpecTree generate OpenAPI documentation?
key_facts: SpecTree class in spec.py is the main interface
Supports flask, quart, falcon, starlette backends
Uses Pydantic models for request/response schemas
register() method connects to the backend application

questions.query: How does SpecTree handle validation errors?
key_facts: validation_error_status defaults to 422
ValidationError model from spectree.models is default
before callback runs after request validation
after callback runs after response validation
